narrative:
Salem Township has 4,346 registered voters, with 55.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.4 percentage points.
